# Audience Personas ## Purpose This file defines the audiences most likely to buy Agentic OneBotAds, an AI-assisted ads and marketing operations product. This is starter content. Validate and refine it with first-party data from: - GA4 demographic and acquisition reports - Sea

analysis.main_problem: Some campaigns are spending budget without matching conversion efficiency.
insights: LinkedIn SMEs is the strongest revenue-efficient segment.
Improve the weakest campaign with a sharper, benefit-led hook.

- # Audience Personas ## Purpose This file defines the audiences most likely to buy Agentic OneBotAds, an AI-assisted ads and marketing operations product. This is starter content. Validate and refine it with first-party data from: - GA4 demographic and acquisition reports - Sea Built for a professional, modern, direct LinkedIn campaign.
creative.description: Your AI co-pilot for campaign performance and publication drafting.

ab_variants.headline: Turn campaign data into better ads with Agentic OneBotAds
ab_variants.primary_text: Give SMEs and marketing teams a faster route to stronger performance insights and publication-ready copy.

ab_variants.headline: Your AI assistant for LinkedIn advertising
ab_variants.primary_text: Create, review, and optimize campaigns with grounded brand context and a professional, modern, direct tone.

image.image_prompt: Create a brand-safe campaign visual background for Agentic OneBotAds, aimed at SMEs and marketing teams, optimized for LinkedIn publication format. Visual objective: support a campaign designed to Increase qualified leads. Creative direction should support the headline concept "Agentic OneBotAds: smarter ads for SMEs and marketing teams". Leave clear composition space for a CTA such as "Discover the solution". Brand guidance: Grounded context found in the knowledge base: - # Previous Ads Examples ## Purpose This file stores reusable ad examples and message patterns in a retrieval-friendly format. Use it to help the assistant answer with co.... Performance context to reflect visually: Scale cues from CAMP003, the current best campaign; Avoid repeating the weak signals from CAMP001. Optimization focus: Increase budget on CAMP003 by 15-20% and keep prioritizing the best-performing LinkedIn segments; Tighten audience targeting for SMEs and marketing teams and remove low-intent segments from the weakest campaign mix. Use modern editorial SaaS advertising, strong contrast, clean product storytelling. High quality, campaign-ready, modern, brand-safe, no text, no words, no letters, no logos, no watermark, no fake UI, no readable labels.
image.negative_prompt: words, letters, text, watermark, logo, distorted UI, unreadable dashboard, blurry, low quality, fake brand marks
image.alt_text: LinkedIn campaign visual for Agentic OneBotAds aimed at SMEs and marketing teams, supporting a goal to Increase qualified leads.

quick_wins.recommendation: Increase budget on CAMP003 by 15-20% and keep prioritizing the best-performing LinkedIn segments.
quick_wins.reason: LinkedIn for SMEs is leading with 5.0 ROAS.

quick_wins.recommendation: Reduce spend on CAMP001 until fresh creative is tested.
quick_wins.reason: Facebook for Students is underperforming at 2.4 ROAS. Some campaigns are spending budget without matching conversion efficiency.

strategic_changes.recommendation: Tighten audience targeting for SMEs and marketing teams and remove low-intent segments from the weakest campaign mix.
strategic_changes.reason: CPA is elevated at 20.22, and the weakest row is already at 20.0.

strategic_changes.recommendation: Create a second creative for Agentic OneBotAds focused on increase qualified leads with your ai co-pilot for campaign performance and publication drafting..
strategic_changes.reason: The new creative should stay aligned with the existing headline "Agentic OneBotAds: smarter ads for SMEs and marketing teams" while fixing the weakest-performing campaign.

strategic_changes.recommendation: Test a sharper CTA against "Discover the solution" and keep the message tied to increase qualified leads.
strategic_changes.reason: The current creative is usable, but the CTA can be pushed closer to the campaign goal and strongest audience signal for SMEs and marketing teams.

ab_tests: Test the current headline "Agentic OneBotAds: smarter ads for SMEs and marketing teams" against a more outcome-led variant for SMEs and marketing teams.
Test CTA "Discover the solution" against a lower-friction CTA tied directly to increase qualified leads.
Test a LinkedIn visual built around SMEs proof points vs. the current broad campaign composition.
Test the winning audience angle against a fresh creative tailored to Facebook recovery.
